subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that through the Bestowal and Grace of the Beauty of Abha, from the Continent of Europe I have returned to the Continent of Africa…. During this long trip great capacity was created…
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement
